member.name: T:PokeballShuffler.Models.BallType
member.summary: Types of Pokeball available in the game.

member.name: T:PokeballShuffler.Models.Pokeball
member.summary: Represents a single Pokeball instance with its type and image source.

member.name: T:PokeballShuffler.ViewModels.MainViewModel
member.summary: Main ViewModel for the Pokeball Shuffler game. Handles all game logic: shuffle draws, basket management, reset.

member.name: M:PokeballShuffler.ViewModels.MainViewModel.CreateInitialPool
member.summary: Creates the initial pool of 15 balls: 5 Poké Ball, 4 Premier Ball, 3 Great Ball, 2 Ultra Ball, 1 Master Ball.

member.name: M:PokeballShuffler.ViewModels.MainViewModel.ShuffleAsync
member.summary: Performs the next shuffle: draws balls from pool into the next basket.

member.name: M:PokeballShuffler.ViewModels.MainViewModel.Reset
member.summary: Resets the game: clears all baskets, refills the pool, resets round counter.

member.name: T:PokeballShuffler.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
